ocl:
context MaintenanceTask
inv: (self.machine <> null) and (self.isDone = true)

context Workshop
inv: self.lines->exists(x | x.isActive <> true)

context BillOfMaterials
inv: self.items->any(x | x.requiredQty >= 1) <> null

context Plant
inv: self.suppliers->any(x | x.name <> '') <> null

context ProductionLine
inv: self.stations->any(x | x.stationId <> '') <> null

context Shift
inv: self.endTime <> null and self.startTime <> null

context Shift
inv: self.startTime <> null and self.endTime <> null

context Shift
inv: self.endTime <> null implies self.startTime <> null

context Shift
inv: self.startTime <> null implies self.endTime <> null

context Product
inv: (self.unitPrice >= 66 and self.unitPrice <= 77) and (self.unitPrice < 66)

context Plant
inv: (self.suppliers->collect(x | x.shipments)->size() >= 2) and (not(self.suppliers->collect(x | x.shipments)->size() >= 2))

context Workstation
inv: (self.machines->forAll(x | x.manufacturer <> '')) and (not(self.machines->forAll(x | x.manufacturer <> '')))

context ProductionLine
inv: (self.workshop <> null) and (not(self.workshop <> null))

context Shift
inv: ((self.endTime <> null) = (self.startTime <> null)) and (not((self.endTime <> null) = (self.startTime <> null)))

context BOMItem
inv: (self.inventoryItem <> null) and (not(self.inventoryItem <> null))
